prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Pollinator Learning Garden in Fairmont. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Pollinator Learning Garden dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Pollinator Learning Garden opened to the public on 17 May 2016. A separate entry records construction completion in 2015.
